channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Toddler Declared Dead Found Breathing Hours Later In US Hospital Morgue

media:content.media:description: Toddler declared dead found breathing in the morgue a few hours later.

item.description: A toddler discovered in a pool in a Phoenix suburb in February was declared dead before being found breathing.
item.content:encoded: A toddler discovered in a pool in a Phoenix suburb in February was declared dead before being found breathing.

item.title: 'US Jobs Are For Americans, Not Foreign Fraudsters': Vance Amid H-1B Probe

media:content.media:description: Vance made the comments during a stop at the Wisconsin Air National Guard's base.

item.description: Vance said H-1B work visa programme was originally a route for "a brilliant technology person, or a brilliant scientist, or a brilliant doctor" to work legally in the United States.
item.content:encoded: Vance said H-1B work visa programme was originally a route for "a brilliant technology person, or a brilliant scientist, or a brilliant doctor" to work legally in the United States.

item.title: Israel Threatens To Attack Iran "With Greater Force" Amid US Strikes

media:content.media:description: Israel's military is ready to strike Iran. (File)

item.description: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said Iran had been weakened by the two previous military campaigns Israel launched against it.
item.content:encoded: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said Iran had been weakened by the two previous military campaigns Israel launched against it.

item.title: Putin May Escalate Ukraine War Despite Peace Efforts By Trump: Report
item.description: President Vladimir Putin is rejecting calls to negotiate peace with Kyiv, with Ukraine's recent drone strikes on Russia's oil refineries and ports strengthening his resolve to keep fighting for now.
item.content:encoded: President Vladimir Putin is rejecting calls to negotiate peace with Kyiv, with Ukraine's recent drone strikes on Russia's oil refineries and ports strengthening his resolve to keep fighting for now.

item.title: At Least 28 Killed In Fire At Shoe Factory In Eastern China

media:content.media:description: People could be seen taking refuge near the windows and on the roof of the building.

item.description: Hours after the fire broke out at the Huiteng Shoes factory around noon (0400 GMT), authorities feared people were still trapped inside the building in Jinjiang city, Fujian province.
item.content:encoded: Hours after the fire broke out at the Huiteng Shoes factory around noon (0400 GMT), authorities feared people were still trapped inside the building in Jinjiang city, Fujian province.

item.title: Iran Fires 10 Ballistic Missiles At US Military Command Centre In Jordan

media:content.media:description: US bases in the region would be targeted, Iran's military said. (Image for representation)

item.description: Jordan said earlier on Thursday that it had intercepted eight missiles launched from Iran, with no casualties or damage reported.
item.content:encoded: Jordan said earlier on Thursday that it had intercepted eight missiles launched from Iran, with no casualties or damage reported.

item.title: Ali Khamenei's Final Journey: Fighter Jet Escorts Coffin Home For Burial

media:content.media:description: The burial prayer is to be led by Hossein Noori Hamedani, a 101-year-old ayatollah

item.description: Alongside Khamenei's coffin were those of family members killed in the US-Israeli strikes of February 28, the attack that marked the start of the wider Middle East war.
item.content:encoded: Alongside Khamenei's coffin were those of family members killed in the US-Israeli strikes of February 28, the attack that marked the start of the wider Middle East war.

item.title: "Milk At Home Is Australian, Tea Indian": PM Modi's Top Quotes In Melbourne

media:content.media:description: PM Modi addressed Indian community at an event in Melbourne.

item.description: PM Modi concluded a high-level summit with Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese earlier today, marking an expansion of the Comprehensive Strategic Partnership (CSP).
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1125007/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>PM Modi concluded a high-level summit with Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese earlier today, marking an expansion of the Comprehensive Strategic Partnership (CSP).

item.title: Indian Among 2 Charged In Singapore Over $10 Million Money Transfer Case: Report

media:content.media:description: The cases involving Samlit, Malik and Novianti have been adjourned to August 6, 2026.

item.description: At the time, Samlit Moneychanger was named as one of the affected companies, according to a Channel News Asia report.
item.content:encoded: At the time, Samlit Moneychanger was named as one of the affected companies, according to a Channel News Asia report.

item.title: Video: Over 900 Snakes Break Free Amid China Floods, Woman Dead, Many Bitten

media:content.media:description: The snakes that escaped from the farms include venomous species, including cobras.

item.description: A woman has reportedly died after being bitten by a snake and reaching the hospital late due to roadblocks and flood in Hengzhou, a city in Guangxi.
item.content:encoded: A woman has reportedly died after being bitten by a snake and reaching the hospital late due to roadblocks and flood in Hengzhou, a city in Guangxi.

item.title: US Strike Targeted Bushehr Nuclear Plant Perimeter, Says Iranian Official

media:content.media:description: Bushehr houses Iran's only civilian nuclear plant.

item.description: There were no reports of deaths so far, deputy governor of Bushehr province Ehsan Jahanian said on Thursday.
item.content:encoded: There were no reports of deaths so far, deputy governor of Bushehr province Ehsan Jahanian said on Thursday.

item.title: Inside Pakistan's Never-Ending War Within Its Own Borders
item.description: According to an April 2026 report by the Pakistan Institute for Conflict and Security Studies (PICSS), Pakistan ranked first on the Global Terrorism Index for the year 2026. The country saw 1,045 incidents and 1,139 deaths in 2025 alone, the highest fatality level in over a decade.
item.content:encoded: According to an April 2026 report by the Pakistan Institute for Conflict and Security Studies (PICSS), Pakistan ranked first on the Global Terrorism Index for the year 2026. The country saw 1,045 incidents and 1,139 deaths in 2025 alone, the highest fatality level in over a decade.

item.title: Russian Mercenaries, Mali Soldiers Convoy Attacked By Tuareg Separatists

media:content.media:description: Malian security confirmed that the fighting was ongoing. (Representational Image)

item.description: This comes just over two months after another major offensive in which they captured the strategic northern town of Kidal.
item.content:encoded: This comes just over two months after another major offensive in which they captured the strategic northern town of Kidal.

item.title: US Man Cuts His Genitals, Sets Them On Fire To Commit Garage Arson

media:content.media:description: Police charged a Fort Wayne man with felony after self-mutilation and garage fire incident.

item.description: Christopher Peden allegedly mutilated himself and committed arson at a detached garage in Fort Wayne, Indiana.
item.content:encoded: Christopher Peden allegedly mutilated himself and committed arson at a detached garage in Fort Wayne, Indiana.

item.title: 38 Demands, 48-Hour Ultimatum: PoK Is On Brink Of Another Showdown

media:content.media:description: Formed in 2023, the JAAC has rapidly emerged as the most influential civil rights platform in PoJK.

item.description: At the centre of the protests is the demand to abolish 12 legislative assembly seats reserved for Kashmiri refugees settled in Pakistan.
item.content:encoded: At the centre of the protests is the demand to abolish 12 legislative assembly seats reserved for Kashmiri refugees settled in Pakistan.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Thanks To Trump, Saving The US-Iran Islamabad Deal Is Now Harder Than Ever
item.description: Neither side wants more war. But neither side seems able to stop itself from marching towards one.
item.content:encoded: Neither side wants more war. But neither side seems able to stop itself from marching towards one.

item.title: US Parents File Lawsuit After Daycare Worker Tosses Toddler In Air, Drops Him

media:content.media:description: The incident allegedly took place on March 17, 2025, at the club's on-site childcare facility.

item.description: The suit alleges the child was lifted about six feet above the ground before the employee let go of his hands and failed to catch him. The toddler allegedly fell head-first onto a hardwood floor.
item.content:encoded: The suit alleges the child was lifted about six feet above the ground before the employee let go of his hands and failed to catch him. The toddler allegedly fell head-first onto a hardwood floor.

item.title: New Envoys, Old Tensions: Bangladesh-India Ties Enter Fresh Phase

media:content.media:description: Bangladesh is set to name new High Commissioner to India

item.description: As India and Bangladesh navigate a transitional phase in their relationship, Siam's appointment and posting in India will be significant.
item.content:encoded: As India and Bangladesh navigate a transitional phase in their relationship, Siam's appointment and posting in India will be significant.

item.title: Trump Wants To Leave The Iran War Behind. It Won't Be Easy

media:content.media:description: The White House did not immediately respond to a request for comment.

item.description: However, backing down in the face of Iranian defiance could add to Tehran's sense that it can assert leverage over the world's most important oil-shipping channel, anytime it sees fit.
item.content:encoded: However, backing down in the face of Iranian defiance could add to Tehran's sense that it can assert leverage over the world's most important oil-shipping channel, anytime it sees fit.

item.title: How Australian Uranium Can Fuel India's Clean Energy Plans

media:content.media:description: India and Australia have grown considerably closer in recent years

item.description: Australia has around 28 per cent of the world's uranium resources, but it doesn't use any nuclear power or weapons and exports all of it.
item.content:encoded: Australia has around 28 per cent of the world's uranium resources, but it doesn't use any nuclear power or weapons and exports all of it.
